## clampAtLeast

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/utils/time.ts" sourceLine="71" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Clamp a number to a minimum value to avoid zero/negative windows.

```ts title="Signature"
function clampAtLeast(value: number, min: number): number
```
